subject: Sunday Bulletin - January 5, 2026
body: Good morning, Shiloh family! Please find this week's Sunday bulletin attached. We look forward to seeing you in worship.

subject: Building Fund Update - January 2026
body: Dear Committee, we are pleased to report our January building fund totals. Please review and share with the congregation as appropriate.

subject: Valentines Banquet - February 14 at Shiloh
body: You are cordially invited to the Shiloh Baptist Valentine's Banquet on February 14 at 6:00 PM in the Fellowship Hall. Please RSVP by February 10.

subject: Easter Sunday Celebration at Shiloh Baptist - April 5
body: Join us for our Easter Sunday Celebration on April 5 at 10:30 AM. Special music, guest speaker, and Easter egg hunt for the children.

subject: He Is Risen! Easter Bulletin - April 5, 2026
body: He is Risen! This week's Easter bulletin is included. Glory be to God for His wonderful gift.

subject: Mothers Day Celebration - May 10 at Shiloh
body: In honor of all the wonderful mothers in our congregation, Shiloh Baptist Church invites you to our Mother's Day celebration on May 10.

subject: Building Fund Update - November 2026
body: Dear Building Committee, the May fund update is ready for your review. We are making excellent progress toward our renovation goal.

subject: Juneteenth Celebration at Shiloh - June 19
body: Shiloh Baptist Church invites the whole community to our Juneteenth Celebration on June 19 starting at 11:00 AM. Food, fellowship, and praise!

subject: Sunday Bulletin - June 8, 2026
body: Good morning, Shiloh family! Here is this week's Sunday bulletin. Praise God for another beautiful day of worship.

subject: Reminder: Building Committee Meeting March 15
body: This is a friendly reminder that the Building Committee meets on Sunday, March 15 at 1:00 PM in Room 102.

subject: Lent Season Begins - Services and Prayer Schedule
body: As we enter the Lenten season, Shiloh Baptist Church offers additional prayer services every Wednesday at 7:00 PM.

subject: Sunday School End-of-Year Recognition - May 17
body: Dear Sunday School families, please join us on May 17 for our End-of-Year Recognition Service honoring our students and teachers.

subject: Youth Summer Program Registration Now Open
body: Attention families! Registration is now open for the Shiloh Baptist Youth Summer Program. Sessions run June 22 through July 31.

subject: Senior Fellowship Luncheon - June 12
body: Dear senior member, you are invited to our Senior Fellowship Luncheon on June 12 at noon. Please RSVP to Sister Gloria by June 10.

subject: Your RSVP for Valentines Banquet is Confirmed
body: Thank you for your RSVP! We look forward to seeing you at the Valentine's Banquet on February 14.

subject: Thank You for Your Donation to Shiloh Baptist Church
body: Dear Sister Henderson, thank you for your generous donation of $500 to the Shiloh Baptist Building Fund on March 5, 2026.

subject: Building Fund Update - October 2026 - Milestone Reached
body: Praise God! We are delighted to announce we have reached a major milestone in our building fund campaign. Thank you for your faithful giving.

subject: Building Fund Update - February 2026
body: Dear Building Committee, here is the February fund update. Our giving remains strong. God is good!

subject: Sunday Bulletin - January 19, 2026
body: Good morning, Shiloh family! Please see this week's bulletin below. We have several important announcements.

subject: Sunday Bulletin - January 26, 2026
body: Blessings, church family. This week's Sunday bulletin is enclosed. The choir will be leading a special worship segment.
